title: Triggers changes when item name changes
excerpt: Hey, guys, I’m just wondering if we can set up webhooks or listen for an event when the item name changes, aside from recipes.

posts.author: royalayofdigital (royalayofdigital)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey, guys, I’m just wondering if we can set up webhooks or listen for an event when the item name changes, aside from recipes.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Short of it, the only way to get an event sent that an item has changed will result in a recipe someplace.

This could be a webhook created by the API, or webhook Integration (which are the same as created by API), or a custom app recipe. But in the end, you will always end up with a recipe someplace.

posts.author: FrancisElliott (Francis Elliott)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

What do you mean by “aside from recipes”? What are you trying to achieve?
